name: Import a new part from a supplier via the Part Category view
steps:
Given a supplier mixin plugin is installed, enabled, and configured with the supplier company and API token
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in
When the user navigates to the Part Category view
When the user clicks the 'Import Part' button
When the user follows the import wizard to confirm the category, select parameters, and optionally create initial stock
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the imported part appears in the part category list with the supplier-provided name and description
